summary: All new features tested and working: Forgot Password flow, Friends page, Settings Friends link. Premium page confirmed working after iteration_3 fix. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements and navigation working correctly.
passed_tests: Login page: 'Forgot password?' link present with data-testid='forgot-password-link'
Forgot Password page: loads at /forgot-password with email input and 'Send Reset Link' button
Forgot Password API: /api/auth/forgot-password works correctly (returns reset token in dev mode)
Password Reset API: /api/auth/reset-password works (tested complete flow with login verification)
Friends page: loads at /friends with Friends and Requests tabs
Friends API: /api/friends returns empty array for new user
Friends requests API: /api/friends/requests returns empty array for new user
Settings page: Friends link (data-testid='friends-link') present and navigates to /friends
Premium page: loads correctly showing benefits (6 items), Monthly (£7.99) and Yearly (£59.99) plans
Auth endpoints require authentication (401 returned without token)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React console warning 'Cannot update component while rendering another' in Register page - setState being called during render. Non-blocking but should be addressed.

test_credentials.note: New users can be registered with any email/password combination

seed_data_creation: None needed - used dynamic test user creation
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Forgot Password, Friends page) are working. Premium page bug from iteration_3 remains fixed. Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_auth_friends.py covers: forgot password flow, password reset, friends list, friend requests. Console warning in Register component should be investigated but doesn't block functionality.
